phaseQuestion: How does real work actually get done?

phaseShift.phase5: How does real work get done?

principle: Communities create change through purposeful action.
operationalSpine: Ideas → Missions → Projects → Tasks → Action → Impact → Legacy
actionCycle: Need → Mission → Planning → Execution → Reflection → Knowledge → Legacy
actionHierarchy: Vision → Mission → Project → Milestone → Task → Activity
concept: Engine that transforms ideas into completed community work — not just an organizing engine.
deliverables: Mission Design System — structured mission creation, Mission Library
Execution Operating System — work packages, Daily Operations Brief
Volunteer Development System — service develops leaders, Volunteer Passport
Experience & Event Operating System — experiences build community, Experience Playbook
Initiative Operating System — coordinate statewide, empower locally, Initiative Command Center
Collaborative Decision System — organizational memory, Decision Graph
Commitment & Follow-Through System — Commitment Compass, support not punishment
Capacity Coordination System — Arkansas Capacity Map, logistics engine
Community Impact Intelligence System — Impact Chain, outcomes not activity
Community Storytelling System — Arkansas Story Atlas, memory triad
Learning & Improvement System — Improvement Graph, wisdom over work
evaluationQuestion: Does this strengthen relationships, deepen belonging, and help people grow into community builders?
